paper_title: Quality Marker Discovery and Quality Evaluation of Eucommia ulmoides Pollen Using UPLC-QTOF-MS Combined with a DPPH-HPLC Antioxidant Activity Screening Method

methods.description: This method involves the validation of a simultaneous HPLC analysis method using three markers as indicators for efficient quality control of Eucommia ulmoides Pollen (EUP). The validation parameters include linearity, stability, precision, repeatability, and recovery.

steps.description: The coefficient of determination (r2) showed excellent linearity from 0.9999 to 1.0000 for all markers based on the prepared calibration curve.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate linearity using coefficient of determination

steps.description: All RSD values of the repeatability, precision, and stability of the investigated markers were <1.55%.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate RSD values for repeatability, precision, and stability

steps.description: The recoveries (%) of compounds 1-3 ranged from 98% to 102% for each concentration level, and the RSDs were less than 2%.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate recovery percentages and RSDs for compounds

methods.description: This method validates the quantification of three Q-markers with respect to linearity, stability, precision, repeatability, and recovery according to the Chinese Pharmacopoeia guidelines.

steps.description: Serial dilutions of mixed standards were used to establish the standard curves, and the linear regression equation correlation coefficient and linear range were calculated.
steps.searchable_summary: establish standard curves and calculate linear regression parameters

steps.description: For precision, the solutions were examined in triplicate for 3 consecutive days.
steps.searchable_summary: examine solutions for precision over 3 days

steps.description: To validate the repeatability, six samples of EUP were accurately weighed and prepared independently, according to the optimal conditions above, and then analyzed.
steps.searchable_summary: validate repeatability by analyzing six independently prepared samples

steps.description: The same sample solution was taken and determined at 0, 2, 4, 8, 12, 24, and 48 h after its fresh preparation, according to the above chromatographic conditions, to evaluate the stability.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate stability by analyzing sample solution at multiple time points

steps.description: Recovery experiments were used to assess the accuracy of the method. Standards at three different concentration levels, including low (80%), median (100%), and high (120%) levels, were added to samples with known content.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct recovery experiments at different concentration levels

methods.description: This method involves analyzing the contents of three Q-markers from EUP samples of different batches to identify authenticity and evaluate quality.

steps.description: The contents of the three Q-markers from the EUP samples of different batches are given in Table 4.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze Q-marker contents in EUP samples

steps.description: Samples from other batches contained Q-markers, and the content distribution ranges of QSH, QSB, and QNH were 9.12 to 14.74 mg/g, 7.29 to 10.52 mg/g, and 2.05 to 4.05 mg/g, respectively.
steps.searchable_summary: determine content distribution ranges of Q-markers

steps.description: Four varieties and mixed pollen were tested, and it was found that the contents of the three quality markers in the EUP of different varieties were within the normal ranges.
steps.searchable_summary: test varieties and mixed pollen for Q-marker content

methods.description: This method involves the analysis of EUP extracts using UPLC-ESI-TOF/MS to identify and quantify components.

steps.description: The extracts of EUP were analyzed using UPLC-ESI-TOF/MS, which consisted of a Waters ACQUZTY UPLC system coupled to a Xevo G2-S QT mass spectrometer.
An ACQUITY UPLC ® BEH C 18 column was used during the analysis, and the temperature of the column was maintained at 40°C.
steps.searchable_summary: use ACQUITY UPLC BEH C18 column for analysis

steps.description: The flow rate was 0.3 mL/min, the injection volume was 2 µL, and the determination wavelength was set at 190-400 nm.
steps.searchable_summary: set flow rate, injection volume, and wavelength for UPLC

steps.description: Mass spectrometry was carried out in the scan mode from 50 m/z to 1200 m/z using both negative and positive modes.
steps.searchable_summary: perform mass spectrometry in scan mode
